cbRt 0.3.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with cbRt

CBRT EDDS Series Information Data

Source: R/data.R
cbrt_meta_data.Rd

A bundled dataset containing metadata for all available CBRT EVDS series. This is a snapshot of metadata that ships with the package for offline reference. For the most up-to-date metadata, use cbrt_meta().

Usage

data(cbrt_meta_data)

Format

A tibble with metadata for all available series including:

SERIE_CODE

Series code (e.g., "TP.DK.USD.A")

SERIE_NAME_ENG

Series name in English

FREQUENCY_STR

Data frequency (e.g., "Daily", "Monthly")

START_DATE

Series start date

END_DATE

Series end date

See also

cbrt_meta to fetch fresh metadata from the API

Examples

# Load bundled metadata
data(cbrt_meta_data)

# Search for USD exchange rate series
if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

cbrt_meta_data |>
  filter(str_detect(SERIE_CODE, "USD")) |>
  select(SERIE_CODE, SERIE_NAME_ENG, FREQUENCY_STR)
} # }
